positive: A stylized, maximalist illustration of a celestial forest canopy viewed from below. The main subjects are glowing, bioluminescent flora and fauna suspended in deep space. Depict intricate patterns of glowing roots forming an organic network, interwoven with silhouettes of stylized crescent moons and constellations. The color palette should be rich indigo, deep sapphire blue, vibrant teal, and pops of ethereal gold and electric violet. The composition must be highly symmetrical and centrally focused, suitable for wrapping around apparel. Style should be neo-traditional illustrative tattoo art meets cosmic watercolor painting, featuring clean lines and high contrast between the glowing elements and the dark void. Dramatic backlighting from the bioluminescent sources, high detail, graphic novel quality, centered print design.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, extra limbs, poor anatomy, bad composition, low resolution, amateur drawing, photo, grainy
